rules.description: Upgrade Azure Database for PostgreSQL flexible server instances to PostgreSQL version 13 or later.
rules.fix: Upgrade Azure Database for PostgreSQL flexible server instances to PostgreSQL version 13 or later.

rules.description: Use custom maintenance schedule on flexible server instances to select a preferred time for service updates to be applied.
rules.fix: Use custom maintenance schedule on flexible server instances to select a preferred time for service updates to be applied

rules.description: Configure GRS to ensure that your database meets its availability and durability targets even in the face of failures or disasters.
rules.fix: Configure GRS to ensure that your database meets its availability and durability targets even in the face of failures or disasters.

rules.description: Create a cross region read replica to protect the database from regional failures. A read replica is a read-only replica that asynchronously updates from an Azure Database for PostgreSQL flexible server instance using physical replication technology. A read replica lags the primary server.
rules.fix: Create a cross region read replica to protect the database from regional failures. A read replica is a read-only replica that asynchronously updates from an Azure Database for PostgreSQL flexible server instance using physical replication technology. A read replica lags the primary server.
